release_notes: V14.43 build 190 audio alarm fatigue patch: adds optional seeded random audio patterns with 50 rhythm variants per alarm type, adds a user-configurable mute duration clamped to 1-30 minutes, applies a default 30-second buzzer-on and 15-second quiet-pause alarm cycle, keeps fixed-pattern mode available, keeps visual alarms active while audio is muted, and preserves the build 189 WiFi, Nightscout, 1-hour mini-trend and simple 12-hour buffer logic.
